name: pi-subagents-persona
description: A Pi companion extension to pi-subagents: switchable supervisor personas (system prompt + optional model/effort + opencode-style delegation/tool/skill allowlists), bound to a key and shown in the footer.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/permissions.test.ts test/persona.test.ts test/subagent.test.ts test/seed.test.ts test/integration.test.ts
